name: Jolly Time Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow baking pan, mix together the popped popcorn, pretzel sticks, cheese curls, and peanuts.
2. In a small saucepan, melt the margarine over low heat.
3. Stir in the seasoned salt, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic salt until well combined.
4. Pour the melted butter mixture over the dry ingredients and mix well to ensure everything is evenly coated.
5. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 250°F (120°C).
6. Bake for 45 minutes, stirring several times to prevent burning and ensure even cooking.
